title: Steel Town
writer: Gerald Drayson Adams, Lou Breslow, Leonard Freeman
actors: Ann Sheridan, John Lund, Howard Duff
plot: Steve Kostain (Lund), nephew of the owner, begins working at a steel mill to learn the business from the bottom up. He rooms with a steel working family, the McNamaras, and falls for the daughter, "Red" (Sheridan), who is already ...
